districts.name: The +2 Suburbs
districts.intro: Welcome to Numerica! The Scrambler has ruined all the even addresses here. Help us count up by 2s to fix them!

districts.name: The -5 Marketplace
districts.intro: Oh no, the prices are dropping but the signs are missing! We need to count down by 5s to find the missing signs.

districts.name: The Tens Tower
districts.intro: The elevator is broken and jumping by 10s! Can you figure out the missing floors?

districts.name: The Hundreds Highway
districts.intro: We are zooming fast! Cars here have license plates counting by 100s. Let's find the patterns.

districts.name: The Thousands Citadel
districts.intro: The core of the city! Everything here counts by 1,000s. Fix the master code to defeat The Scrambler!
